puzzleDescription: Build a mini-calculator using a switch statement that performs an operation (+, -, *, /) on two numbers.
objective: Input two numbers and an operator (+, -, *, /). Use a switch statement to print the result.
hints: Use single quotes for cases since 'op' is a char (e.g., case '+':).
Perform the math inside the println (e.g., System.out.println(a * b);).
